title: Dispute a decision
description: Explains how we work collaboratively with taxpayers to resolve issues quickly and efficiently.
keywords: dispute, external review, objection, remission, review, refund, private ruling, in house facilitation

child_links.title: In-house facilitation
child_links.description: Ask for a facilitator to guide a discussion between you and your case officer with the aim to resolve your dispute.

child_links.title: Small business independent review
child_links.description: If you disagree with your small business' audit position, you may be able to request an independent review.

child_links.title: Large market independent review
child_links.description: If you disagree with your large business' audit position, you may be able to request an independent review.

child_links.title: The independent review process
child_links.description: How small business and large market independent reviews are conducted.

child_links.title: Our service principles
child_links.description: What you can expect of us, and what we expect of you, when you dispute or object to a decision we’ve made.

source_title: Dispute a decision | Australian Taxation Office
source_description: What you can expect of us, and what we expect of you, when you dispute or object to a decision we've made. QC44429. Tools.
